mapper.select:
SELECT rank_no, name, weight_pct, ownership_pct, eval_amount_100m FROM nps_portfolio_item WHERE institution_code = #{institutionCode} AND asset_type = #{asset} AND market = #{market}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')
ORDER BY rank_no
ORDER BY CASE WHEN ownership_pct IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, rank_no
